NEWID()      FROM          Groups      WHERE SiteId = @S SET @iRet = 0  SET @GroupCount = 0  SET @UserCount = 0  BEGIN TRAN  OPEN Users_Cursor  FETCH NEXT  FROM      Users_Cursor  INTO      @ItemId, @Deleted, @Login, @Title, @Email, @Notes,      @IsSiteAdmin, @IsActive, @Hidden, @ContentType, @ContentTypeId, @ItemGuid  WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  BEGIN  SELECT @LN = NULL  SELECT @UserCount = @UserCount + 1  SELECT @EncodedNotes = dbo.fn_HtmlEncode(@Notes, 1)  SELECT @SipAddress = @Email

FETCH NEXT  FROM      Users_Cursor  INTO      @ItemId, @Deleted, @Login, @Title, @Email, @Notes,      @IsSiteAdmin, @IsActive, @Hidden, @ContentType, @ContentTypeId, @ItemGuid  END  CLOSE Users_Cursor  OPEN Groups_Cursor  FETCH NEXT  FROM      Groups_Cursor  INTO      @ItemId, @Deleted, @Login, @Title, @DLAlias, @Notes,      @IsSiteAdmin, @IsActive, @Hidden, @ContentType, @ContentTypeId, @ItemGuid  WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  BEGIN  SELECT @GroupCount = @GroupCount + 1  SELECT @EncodedNotes = dbo

FETCH NEXT  FROM      Groups_Cursor  INTO      @ItemId, @Deleted, @Login, @Title, @DLAlias, @Notes,      @IsSiteAdmin, @IsActive, @Hidden, @ContentType, @ContentTypeId, @ItemGuid  END  CLOSE Groups_Cursor  DEALLOCATE Users_Cursor  DEALLOCATE Groups_Cursor
